title: How to count cells not equal to a value
task: Count every cell except those matching a specific value.
keywords: exclude value from count google sheets

excel.note: The not-equal operator is <> inside the quoted criterion.

explanation: COUNTIF's criterion accepts <> for "not equal": three cells (banana, cherry, banana) aren't "apple". Caution: <> also counts BLANK cells in the range as not-equal — add -COUNTBLANK(A2:A6) if you only want non-blank mismatches. To reference a cell, concatenate: =COUNTIF(A2:A6,"<>"&C1).
